# v0.1.14

## Highlights

- Added agent-side `mcp_call` support, allowing the loop to call discovered MCP tools as part of normal task execution.
- Preserved the policy-first model: automatic MCP calls are limited to enabled servers and refreshed tool summaries already present in context.
- Added MCP call summaries and diagnostics so failed calls point users toward `akernel mcp list` and `akernel mcp refresh <name>`.

## Verification

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
